meaning: v.解释,说明,口译,通译,认为是...的意思
examples: The students were asked to interpret the poem.
She couldn't speak much English so her children had to interpret for her.
The chambermaid spoke little English, so her husband came with her to interpret.
Interpret guidelines and take action to implement necessary changes to address issues at hand.
Why carrer women are best marriage partners Guys, please, be careful in the way you interpret this articles.
